inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 net loss $618.2M on revenue $0.3M; R&D $493.9M and operating loss $729.3M (ACHR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001824502_26_000019.htm)
inputs.normalization_note: Pre-revenue eVTOL developer; Lawrence owner-cash is deeply negative. Interest income on cash stack partially offsets operating burn but is not durable owner cash.

bear.notes: Certification delay or failure; continued dilution; payoff near impaired liquid asset value

base.notes: Partial Midnight certification and limited commercial ramp; component sum base case

bull.notes: FAA type certification on schedule; United/Stellantis conditional orders convert; defense revenue scales

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Midnight aircraft and manufacturing lines capitalized; economic value depends on certification success (10-K Item 1)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant assets?
option_scan.evidence: Midnight eVTOL in certification; Georgia high-volume facility under scale-up (10-K Item 1 Business)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: FY2025 operating loss $729.3M on revenue $0.3M; Q1 2026 operating loss $254.6M (10-K, 10-Q)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: United conditional purchase up to $1.0B aircraft plus $500M option; USAF contracts (10-K Note 12)

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Public NYSE issuer; no material private equity stakes at cost below fair value (10-K)

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No litigation recovery or special dividend catalyst

optionality_gate.notes: Pre-profit eVTOL; filing-locked net liquid ~$2.21/sh offers partial dhando floor; certification option drives upside

growth_explanation.mechanism: Commercial air-taxi revenue begins only after FAA type certification of Midnight; United, Stellantis, and U.S. Air Force partnerships provide conditional demand paths.

falsifiers.trigger: FAA type certification delayed more than 18 months versus current public guidance without offsetting partner relief
Combined cash and short-term investments fall below $800M while net loss run rate stays above $500M annually
falsifiers.source: 10-Q balance sheet and statements of operations

stance_proposal.override_reason: Filing-locked net liquid assets ~$2.21/sh cap downside partially, but pre-revenue burn, dilution from 624M to 767M shares, and certification binary keep moat unproven.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Three additive components map net liquid claims, Midnight certification/partner option, and dilution/burn reserve once each.

components.label: Net cash, short-term investments, and debt claims

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ACHR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260511_rpt20260331_acc0001824502_26_000038.htm: cash $951.1M, short-term investments $824.8M, debt $80.2M; FY2025 net loss $618.2M per ACHR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001824502_26_000019.htm; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

source.locator: Cash and cash equivalents $951.1M at March 31, 2026
Long-term debt current $1.4M + noncurrent $78.8M at March 31, 2026
Weighted-average shares outstanding, basic and diluted 766,850,002

assumptions.label: Net liquid claim after debt and warrant liabilities
assumptions.rationale: Filing-locked cash, restricted cash, and short-term investments less debt and warrant liabilities; low/high stress debt +10% and mark haircuts on liquid assets.

components.label: Midnight FAA certification and partner milestone value

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ACHR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260511_rpt20260331_acc0001824502_26_000038.htm: cash $951.1M, short-term investments $824.8M, debt $80.2M; FY2025 net loss $618.2M per ACHR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001824502_26_000019.htm; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

source.locator: Net loss $618.2 million for year ended December 31, 2025
Research and development $493.9M (FY2025 consolidated statements of operations)
Weighted-average shares outstanding, basic and diluted 766,850,002

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted Midnight certification and partner milestone value
assumptions.rationale: Conditional United purchase agreement up to $1.0B aircraft plus $500M option, Stellantis partnership, and U.S. Air Force contracts are milestones not in Lawrence owner-cash base; base uses bounded probability-weighted commercialization value pending FAA type certification.

components.label: Future dilution and pre-revenue burn reserve

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ACHR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260511_rpt20260331_acc0001824502_26_000038.htm: cash $951.1M, short-term investments $824.8M, debt $80.2M; FY2025 net loss $618.2M per ACHR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260302_rpt20251231_acc0001824502_26_000019.htm; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

source.locator: Weighted-average shares outstanding, basic and diluted 766,850,002

assumptions.label: Future dilution, ATM issuance, and burn reserve
assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for continued pre-revenue operating losses, S-3/424B5 equity issuance capacity, and share count growth from 624M FY2025 to 767M Q1 2026 diluted shares.

calculations.label: Dilution and burn reserve per share

ownership_waterfall.net_economic_claim: One ACHR common share equals pro-rata net liquid assets plus risk-adjusted certification milestone value, less dilution and burn reserve.
excluded_claims: Interest income on cash stack is embedded in liquid asset marks, not double-counted as owner cash.
United conditional purchase obligations are milestone-dependent, not revenue in base owner-cash path.
ownership_waterfall.reconciliation: Q1 2026 cash $951.1M + short-term investments $824.8M less debt $80.2M and warrant liabilities $7.1M on 766.85M shares.
